Task2 

16 examples per minibatch per machine
--per_device_train_batch_size 16

DistributedSampler to partition the data
gather-scatter over the gradients
adding arguments to the parser for ip, port, and world size
add the init_process_group call

add timing list for iteration. average at the end (only on the master node)

all reduce sum across all nodes and then takes the average is the exact same operation

Task3

from torch.nn.parallel import DistributedDataParallel as DDP

if args.local_rank != -1:
    model = DDP(model)
